title: デビュー戦の後に・風水は奇跡にあらず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey puts on a splendid performance.
Her unique feng shui-style running captures the
interest of the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I assumed she would immediately aim for a
bigger race next, she would prefer to focus on
building her strength. Feng shui isn't a miracle
worker—it only makes it easier to bring out your
true potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Hokko Tarumae successfully conquers
a graded race. As she emphasizes the importance
of having people who support her, Copano
Rickey nods in agreement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is to grow Copano Rickey's fan
base, and we decide to look for another runner
who can help us in our training.
